translations.Starter overview with sample KPIs and ac: Starter overview with sample KPIs and activity placeholders. Replace this view with your own data.
translations.Wire buttons here to create records, ope: Wire buttons here to create records, open lists, or deep links. Use the sidebar for Settings and Documentation.
translations.This app needs OpenRegister to store and: This app needs OpenRegister to store and manage data. Please install OpenRegister from the app store to get started.
